notes: Government of Canada portal covering federal Canadian regulations and proposed legislation. The Canada.ca domain is the umbrella federal portal; specific departments (parl.ca, justice.gc.ca, etc.) may have their own SecID namespaces.

match_nodes.description: Artificial Intelligence and Data Act (MOVED to parl.ca)

data.description: Proposed Canadian federal AI legislation (part of Bill C-27).
data.notes: DEPRECATED LOCATION. AIDA is filed under parl.ca per the DNS-canonical rule — Parliament of Canada is the legal publisher of bills and acts. Canada.ca/ISED-ISDE is an implementation/promotion page rather than the legal publisher. Canonical SecID is now `secid:regulation/parl.ca/aida`. Retained so legacy citations of `secid:regulation/canada.ca/aida` still resolve.
